session_note: S67 batch PDR (user: "I approve full session run and full autonomous"). Recommended autonomous-safe top-priority batch. Both ADOPTED -> session is P1-ONLY. P2 logged to carry_forward for an attended session. P1 = knip dead-code cleanup (28 exports + 13 types), per-symbol 4-class triage, empirically gated.
council_battle_ledger: S67 P1 Council (Standard, 1 round). CLAIM: remove knip dead code via 4-class triage (DELETE genuinely-dead values / UNEXPORT internal-over-exports / TRIM unused re-export-barrels / EXCLUDE knip false-positives), gated by tsc -b --noEmit + vitest run (992 baseline) per batch. GROK-ANALYST (grok-4.20-reasoning): ADOPT-WITH-CHANGES. GEMINI-AUDITOR (gemini-2.5-pro): ADOPT-WITH-CHANGES. CONVERGENT C1 (both): DEFER P2 -- editing main.ts entry point unattended for a DEV-only diagnostic dedup is bad risk/reward without live boot smoke. ADOPTED -> P1-only. CONVERGENT C2 (both): tsc+vitest insufficient; ADD vite build (production bundle must compile under isolatedModules/esbuild/rollup) as a hard gate + bundle-size <550KB charter. ADOPTED. C3 (both): wire/save symbols are a serialization contract -- prove not part of (de)serialization before touching. ADOPTED as diligence (read defs + consumers).
prime_audit: S67 P1 PRIME-AUDIT (did not rubber-stamp reviewers). REFUTED empirically: Grok#1 import.meta.glob filename-channel = grep returned NONE (only trystero dynamic import + type-only test imports). Gemini#1 global-registry self-registration = NONE. Both reviewers WRONG that "deleting a TYPE breaks runtime deserialization" -- TS types are fully erased; JSON (de)serialize keys on runtime .kind/.type DATA fields, not type names; a union of local interfaces compiles to nothing. Their isolatedModules "miscompile on unexport" claim is largely FUD -- but RESOLVED by deferring to the empirical vite-build gate (settle by building, not arguing) with EXCLUDE fallback. CAUGHT in A.0 reads (would have been mistakes): v2 is a Vec2 constructor NOT a save-version brand; rngInt + COMMIT/ERASE_DURATION_TICKS are used in-file -> UNEXPORT not DELETE; PhysicsBody is referenced via inline import()-type in territory.test.ts -> EXCLUDE (knip false-positive). Runtime-Verifiability: change is build-time-only (dead-code removal, all erased-or-unreferenced); the boot-then-smoke equivalent = production vite build compiles + bundle serves; no multiplayer runtime needed since no gameplay/wire behavior changes. LATENT FINDING surfaced (not dropped): loadFromLocalStorage is dead while saveToLocalStorage is wired -- game saves but never restores; logged to carry_forward.
triumvirate_check: S67 P1 Triumvirate CHECK (Standard). RALPH:PATROL PASS + GROK-ANALYST SHIP + GEMINI-AUDITOR SHIP (unanimous). All 4 attacked risks cleared: (1) audio `initialized` write-only removal behavior-neutral (idempotency now via AudioContext.state singleton, no reader remained); (2) unexporting NetMessage union arms + WorldSnapshot field types is runtime/build-safe under noEmit (vite build passed; types erased); (3) loadFromLocalStorage deletion = correct dead-code removal (0 call sites; save/no-load asymmetry logged, orthogonal); (4) no deleted runtime VALUE consumed via any channel grep+knip+tsc+vitest+build miss. PhysicsBody false-positive correctly converted (inline import()-type -> top-level import type). VERDICT SHIP. checkpoint 7ba5758.

priorities.label: S67 P1 (Standard) knip dead-code cleanup. SCOPE: 28 unused exports + 13 unused exported types, per-symbol 4-class triage. DELETE (genuinely-dead values, quoted-string-grep first): SPARK_TYPE_NAMES, SPARK_BASE_RADIUS, isFree, isSameStructure, makeLocalDispatcher, stopMusic, isInitialized, loadUnlockedSet, persistUnlockedSet, makeBond(placePrimitive), loadFromLocalStorage, SaveBrands, v2, AREA_CLAIM_BASE/PER_NEIGHBOR/CAP, MEGA_COMBO_MULTIPLIER, TERRITORY_WIN_THRESHOLD (design consts -- delete + durably document values/formula). UNEXPORT (used in-file): SUBSTEP_DT, enforceFreeSparkCap, ZERO_ACCEL(x2), ARC_FLASH/COMMIT/ERASE_DURATION_TICKS, rngInt. TRIM-REEXPORT: creature.ts:125 barrel (VOLTKIN_CONFIG/CREATURE_CONFIGS/getCreatureConfig/CreatureConfig), godlyRecipes/index.ts:72 (GodlyMatch+RecipePredicate). EMPIRICAL-UNEXPORT (verify via tsc+vite build; EXCLUDE on break): StartGameMsg/EndGameMsg/GodlyTriggerMsg, SerializedEffect/SerializedCreature, RelayDiagnostic/StrategyDiagnostic, GhostStructure, PlayerCommon. EXCLUDE (false-positive): PhysicsBody (inline import()-type in territory.test.ts). GATE per batch: tsc -b --noEmit + vitest run >=992. FINAL: vite build compiles + <550KB + knip-delta (count drops, no new) + full vitest. CHECK = RALPH:PATROL + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR triumvirate (Standard) + Rule22 audit.
priorities.check_method: S67 P1 (knip dead-code cleanup, Standard) verified. knip 41 findings (28 exports + 13 types) -> 0. Per-symbol 4-class triage (DELETE 13 / UNEXPORT 21 / TRIM-REEXPORT 2 barrels / EXCLUDE-then-FIX 1). A.0 empirical: grepped every symbol across src + e2e (zero e2e hits); per-symbol intra-file occurrence count split DELETE vs UNEXPORT (flipped 10 symbols DELETE->UNEXPORT: makeLocalDispatcher, loadUnlockedSet, persistUnlockedSet, makeBond, SPARK_BASE_RADIUS, PlayerCommon, GhostStructure, Relay/StrategyDiagnostic, ZERO_ACCEL); reading full defs flipped 3 more (rngInt used by rngPick; COMMIT/ERASE_DURATION_TICKS used in effectLifetime switch). Channel probes REFUTED Council fears: no import.meta.glob, no global-registry self-registration, quoted-string-literal grep on all delete-values = NONE. CHECK = RALPH:PATROL PASS (audio write-only-flag/wire-erasure/save-loader risk hypotheses all refuted; backpressure clean) + GROK-ANALYST (grok-4.20-reasoning) SHIP (ran fresh vite dev reload cycle + debugger on save/sync tests; "no load-bearing symbols removed, no behavior change, no missed consumers") + GEMINI-AUDITOR (gemini-2.5-pro) SHIP ("textbook tool-assisted code hygiene"). PRIME-AUDIT of reviewers: Geminis ".d.ts generated" reasoning is imprecise (noEmit emits NO .d.ts) but its SHIP verdict is sound (the real reason unexport is safe = no declaration emit = no TS4081 possible; vite build empirically confirmed). GATE (all green): tsc -b --noEmit PASS, knip 0, vitest 992/992 (incl save/sync wire + audio tests), vite build OK index 509.35KB gzip 164KB (<550 charter). Two cascades caught+fixed by per-batch tsc tripwire: (1) deleting isInitialized orphaned the write-only `initialized` flag -> removed decl + 2 assignments; (2) deleting SaveBrands orphaned asBondId/asPrimitiveId/asCreatureId imports -> trimmed (kept asPlayerId/asSparkId). One MISCLASSIFICATION caught by gate: unexported creatureVerlet.ts ZERO_ACCEL but its test imports it (knip flagged only verlet.ts ZERO_ACCEL) -> reverted to exported. Bundle flat (509.37->509.35KB): Rollup already tree-shook unused exports, so the win is SOURCE clarity + knip=0 baseline, honestly NOT bytes. checkpoint 7ba5758.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #knip-41-to-0 #per-symbol-4-class-triage #gate-caught-3-mistakes #council-deferred-P2 #bundle-flat-tree-shake: knip dead-code cleanup, 28 unused exports + 13 unused types -> 0, across 21 files (+43/-131). KEY METHOD: a naive delete-list would have been WRONG ~13 times; the pedantic A.0 saved it. (a) grep src_hits==1 does NOT mean delete-safe -- it means "appears only in its own file", which can still be USED IN-FILE (then the fix is remove `export` keyword, NOT delete). Per-symbol intra-file occurrence-count flipped 10 symbols DELETE->UNEXPORT; reading full defs flipped 3 more (rngInt feeds rngPick; COMMIT/ERASE_DURATION_TICKS feed effectLifetime switch). (b) v2 LOOKED like a save-version brand (Council assumed so) but reading it = a Vec2 constructor v2(x,y); always read the def. (c) PhysicsBody was a knip FALSE-POSITIVE -- referenced via inline `import(...).PhysicsBody` type-cast in territory.test.ts which knip cannot see; fixed by converting to a top-level `import type` (knip-visible) rather than unexporting (which tsc-over-src would have broken). (d) per-batch tsc tripwire caught 2 CASCADES (deleting a getter orphaned its write-only backing flag `initialized`; deleting a bundle-object orphaned its member imports) and 1 MISCLASSIFICATION (I unexported creatureVerlet.ts ZERO_ACCEL but only verlet.ts ZERO_ACCEL was flagged -- the test imports the creatureVerlet one). LESSON: run tsc after each logical batch, not just at the end -- it localizes the break. EMPIRICAL WINS: confirmed noEmit (no composite/declaration) => unexporting a union arm referenced by an exported union is SAFE (TS4081 declaration-emit error cannot fire); vite build settled it, refuting the Council reviewers isolatedModules-miscompile FUD. HONEST RESULT: bundle 509.37->509.35KB (flat) because Rollup already tree-shakes unused exports -- the deliverable is SOURCE clarity + a knip=0 baseline (future dead code now surfaces immediately), NOT byte savings; said so plainly. COUNCIL: Standard 3-way returned ADOPT-WITH-CHANGES x2 CONVERGENT -> DEFER P2 (main.ts strategySummary dedup; unattended entry-point edit for a DEV-only diagnostic = bad risk/reward with no live boot smoke) + ADD vite build gate. Both adopted. CHECK triumvirate unanimous SHIP. DESIGN CONSTS PRESERVED (removed as currently-dead; re-add when territory-win mode ships): TERRITORY_WIN_THRESHOLD=0.51, AREA_CLAIM_BASE=1.0, AREA_CLAIM_PER_NEIGHBOR=0.1, AREA_CLAIM_CAP=2.0, MEGA_COMBO_MULTIPLIER=1.75; also SPARK_TYPE_NAMES (Dot/Line/Triangle/Square/Circle/Spiral display-name map). PRODUCT FINDING (not dropped): loadFromLocalStorage was dead while saveToLocalStorage is wired -- the game persists snapshots but never restores them; logged to carry_forward. checkpoint 7ba5758.
